name: Secure API Service Architecture (Generated)
description: Demonstrates the output of calm generate from the secure-api-service pattern. A WAF and load balancer sits in front of a customer API service, which persists data to a customer database.

nodes.name: WAF and Load Balancer
nodes.description: Web application firewall and load balancer that terminates TLS, inspects inbound HTTP traffic, and forwards requests to the API service.

nodes.name: Customer API Service
nodes.description: REST API service that handles customer data requests. Sits behind the WAF/load balancer and communicates with the customer database for data persistence.

nodes.name: Customer Database
nodes.description: Relational database storing customer records. Accessed exclusively by the Customer API Service via JDBC.

relationships.description: WAF and load balancer forwards validated HTTPS requests to the Customer API Service
Customer API Service reads and writes customer records to the Customer Database
